User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Block private dashboard pages from being indexed
Disallow: /dashboard
Disallow: /dashboard/
Disallow: /settings
Disallow: /profile
Disallow: /transactions
Disallow: /wallet
Disallow: /admin

# Allow public pages
Allow: /login
Allow: /register
Allow: /boosting
Allow: /virtual-numbers
Allow: /pricing
Allow: /about
Allow: /blog
Allow: /contact

Sitemap: https://vconnecthub.com/sitemap.xml
